---
agent: dv-stim-writer
description: 'Build or extend reusable stimulus for a scenario or vplan cluster'
argument-hint: '<scenario or VP-xxx..> [ip]'
---
Build the stimulus for: ${input:scenario} on IP ${input:ip:ip name}.
Restate the reachable-behavior list first, follow the layering rules, and
close with the solver-health run and the distribution table as evidence.
